title: Gaarni
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Image}}
'''''Gaarni''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. As the [[Battle on the Frontier]] drew to a close, Frigate ''Gaarni'' replaced the battle weary [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]''. The ''Gaarni'' arrived as a part of a larger task force responsible for relieving [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] initial invasion force sent to establish [[XQ1 Platform|Space Station]] ''[[NL-1]]'' in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
